title: Link-Bearing Elements, Relations, Base URLs, and Crawl Graph · Runtime Contract: Link Elements
summary: Only anchor tags are inspected, every href becomes a page, relation and base semantics disappear, and fetched URL sets stand in for a graph. Predict owner authority, URL and HTTP state, Go ownership, bounded work, accessibility impact, failure, cleanup, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler go link elements increment in semantic provenance-rich link graph. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causa…
objectives: Distinguish navigation, resource, metadata, embedded, form, media, and alternate URL-bearing HTML elements.
Propagate owner correction, deletion, retention expiry, parser fix, and schema migration through versions and reports.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
